LNG_2021: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) (% of adults), 2021
EDB_2018-2022: High school graduation rate (% of residents), 2018-2022
PCT-H_2018-2022: Demographics, Hispanic or Latino (% of residents), 2018-2022

UNS_2018-2022: Percent of residents without health insurance (at the time of the survey).
LNG_2021: Percent of resident adults aged 18 and older who report ever having been told by a doctor, nurse, or other health professional that they have chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), emphysema, or chronic bronchitis. Data for counties and states are age-adjusted. Data for zips, tracts and smaller layers are raw.
DIS_2018-2022: Percent of residents with a disability, defined as one or more sensory disabilities or difficulties with everyday tasks.
EDB_2018-2022: Residents 25 or older with at least a high school degree: including GED and any higher education
EDE_2018-2022: Residents 25 or older with a four-year college (bachelor's) degree or higher
UMP_2018-2022: Percent of residents 16 and older in the civilian labor force who are actively seeking employment.
POV_2018-2022: Percent of residents in families that are in poverty (below the Federal Poverty Level).
PCT-W_2018-2022: Percent of residents within each demographic group. Use this topic to explore age, gender, and racial/ethnic breakdowns.
PCT-B_2018-2022: Percent of residents within each demographic group. Use this topic to explore age, gender, and racial/ethnic breakdowns.
PCT-H_2018-2022: Percent of residents within each demographic group. Use this topic to explore age, gender, and racial/ethnic breakdowns.

LNG_2021: PLACES (Sub-county data (zip codes, tracts)), Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) (County and state level data)
UMP_2018-2022: American Community Survey (Tables B23025, B23001, and C23002)
